title: skills:skill-bundle
description: Defines the `SkillBundle` and `ResolvedFile` types for representing a skill with all its templates resolved and ready for installation.
context: Defines the `SkillBundle` and `ResolvedFile` types for representing a skill with all its templates resolved and ready for installation.

rules:
`ResolvedFile` MUST be an interface with:

- `filename: string` ‚Äî resolved file name
- `content: string` ‚Äî file content with variables substituted

`SkillBundle` MUST be an interface with:

- `name: string` ‚Äî skill name
- `description: string` ‚Äî skill description
- `files: ResolvedFile[]` ‚Äî array of resolved files
- `install(targetDir: string): Promise<void>` ‚Äî writes files to target directory
- `uninstall(targetDir: string): Promise<void>` ‚Äî removes installed files from target directory

The `install()` method MUST:

- Create the target directory if it does not exist
- Write each file in `files` to the target directory, preserving the filename
- Fail gracefully if a file cannot be written

The `uninstall()` method MUST:

- Remove each file that was installed
- Not fail if files do not exist (idempotent)

constraints: All file operations happen in the domain layer for SkillBundle (unlike Skill which has lazy loading).

scenarios.name: File has filename and content
then: it has filename and content properties

scenarios.name: Bundle has install method
then: files are written to the target directory
